grant_title: Governor Murphy Signs Sentencing Reform Legislation
project_area: Criminal justice reform, including compassionate release programs, mandatory minimum sentencing reforms, and recidivism reduction initiatives
demographic_requirements: Focus on inmates with terminal medical conditions, permanent physical incapacities, and youthful defendants (under age 26) for sentencing considerations
eligibility_summary: Eligibility is primarily for state and local government agencies, criminal justice reform organizations, and non-profits working on sentencing reform, compassionate release programs, and recidivism reduction in New Jersey. Specific eligibility may depend on the type of reform initiative (e.g., medical parole expansion, mandatory minimum reforms, or youth sentencing considerations).
